qa._success_criteria_rule: 3 requirements in BA decomposition, 3 entries produced.

AC1.note: Dispatch instructs git diff --cached (pre-commit/staged) instead of git show HEAD (post-commit) because commit occurs after QA. Orchestrator-authorised substitution.

checks.git_commit_command: git commit -m "fix(recovery): tombstone-timing + snapshot-persistence + MemoryMax defaults (manual: agent-blocked)"

root_cause_verification.rationale: The gap (post-bulk-commit untracked/modified files) is addressed by the path-limited staging of exactly the 6 M1 files. The permanently hook-blocked /root/bin script is addressed by the manual-commit note documenting exact commands and the three code gaps.

build_verification.skip_reason: Doc-only L5 task. No compiled artifact, no deployed service, no UI change. BA spec explicitly declares non-UI applicability: 'non-UI -- doc-only + git workflow; cycle does not produce rendered UI changes, browser interaction, Playwright invocation, screenshot evidence, or any change to user-triggered code paths.'

regression_test_results.details: git diff --cached --name-only shows exactly 6 paths; no unintended files staged
Dev report confirms path-limited git add per path; no git add . or git add -A used

e2e_enforcement.blocking_reason: BA spec declares non-UI applicability: 'non-UI -- doc-only + git workflow; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths'. This is a docs-only L5 task that creates a static note file and stages 6 docs/dev/ metadata paths. No web service, no backend endpoint, no user-facing code path was modified. E2E testing has no applicable surface to exercise.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex invocation blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh: BLOCKED: happy-session-recovery.sh is PERMANENTLY FORBIDDEN. The hook fires on the raw bash command text even when the string appears inside a prompt variable passed to codex exec. This is the same block the dev agent encountered.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Self-review substituted. Five adversarial questions reviewed: (1) over-engineering — no, note is 86-line minimal doc; (2) staging scope drift — no, git diff --cached confirms exactly 6 paths; (3) verbatim Gap copy — all three Gaps confirmed present with correct values (4G/3G/2G); (4) AC3 confirmation — command='redev' verified directly from JSON; (5) spec_text_vs_execution_drift — dispatch explicitly instructs pre-commit staged check (git diff --cached) instead of AC1's post-commit literal (git show HEAD); this is an orchestrator-authorised substitution to handle the pre-commit timing, not a BA spec drift issue.
